query: What are the key capabilities of CrowdStrike Falcon for endpoint detection?
answer: CrowdStrike Falcon provides AI-powered endpoint detection and response (EDR) through its cloud-native Threat Graph platform [1]. Its lightweight agent continuously monitors process behaviour, network connections, and file activity without requiring signature updates [2]. The platform correlates telemetry across millions of endpoints globally to identify novel attack patterns in real time [1][3]. Falcon's Overwatch team provides 24/7 managed threat hunting on top of the automated detections [3].

sources.title: CrowdStrike Falcon Platform — Product Overview (2024)
sources.snippet: Falcon's Threat Graph processes over 1 trillion security events per week, leveraging AI and behavioral analytics to detect threats across endpoints, cloud workloads, and identities in real time.

sources.title: EDR Agent Architecture: Lightweight vs. Legacy AV Approaches
sources.snippet: Unlike traditional signature-based antivirus, modern EDR agents such as Falcon operate via kernel-level hooks and user-space sensors, enabling continuous telemetry collection with a sub-1% CPU footprint under normal workloads.

sources.title: Managed Detection & Response: CrowdStrike Overwatch Report Q3 2024
sources.snippet: Overwatch analysts prevented 60,000+ potential breaches in the first half of 2024 by combining automated Falcon detections with human-led threat hunting across customer environments.
